reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate AniList
reauth_confirm.description: Your AniList session has expired. Click Submit to sign in again.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid access token. Please check and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to AniList. Please try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Please check the logs.

abort.already_configured: This AniList account is already configured.
abort.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — the token could not be validated.
abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to AniList during setup.
abort.account_mismatch: The re-authenticated account does not match the original AniList account.

data.watchlist_statuses: Anime watchlist statuses to show in calendar
data.media_formats: Show only these anime formats (empty = all)
data.manga_statuses: Manga list statuses to show in calendar

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch new data from AniList (5–60 minutes)
data_description.watchlist_statuses: Only anime with these statuses appear in the watchlist calendar
data_description.airing_window_days: How many days ahead the airing schedule calendar looks (1–14)
data_description.media_formats: Leave empty to include all formats (TV, Movie, OVA, etc.)
data_description.manga_statuses: Only manga with these statuses appear in the manga calendar
data_description.excluded_genres: Anime with any of these genres will be hidden from season data (e.g. Hentai, Ecchi)
data_description.calendar_reminder_offset: Minutes before an episode airs to trigger a calendar reminder
